snippets.explanation: Validate and bail out early with a guard clause, then keep the happy path flat.

snippets.title: Iterating with range, enumerate, zip and items
snippets.explanation: enumerate gives an index, zip pairs sequences, and .items() unpacks dict keys/values.

snippets.title: Retry loop with while, break and continue
snippets.code:
import time

def call_with_retry(fn, max_attempts=3):
    attempts = 0
    while attempts < max_attempts:
        attempts += 1
        ok, result = fn()
        if not ok:
            time.sleep(2 ** attempts)   # back off, then retry
            continue
        return result                   # success -> leave the loop
    raise RuntimeError("all retries failed")
snippets.explanation: while handles an unknown number of iterations; continue retries, return/break exits on success.

snippets.title: for-else search and match/case routing
snippets.code:
docs = ["intro.md", "setup.md", "faq.md"]
for doc in docs:
    if doc.startswith("faq"):
        chosen = doc
        break
else:
    chosen = None        # runs only if no break happened
print(chosen)            # faq.md

def route(intent):
    match intent:
        case "search":
            return "running search"
        case "summarize":
            return "running summary"
        case _:
            return "unknown intent"

print(route("summarize"))
snippets.explanation: The loop else marks 'no match found'; match/case routes cleanly on the value, with case _ as the default.
